chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C.P. No.D-1633 of 2011 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of M.A. No.7830/2011. 3. For hearing of main case. 05.08.2020 Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Additional Advocate General, Sindh. == This Constitutional Petition is called for hearing. None present on behalf of the petitioner, no intimation received. Same was the position on the last date of hearing viz. 01.02.2017. It is noted that this petition was filed on 06.10.2011, almost nine years have been passed, but the petitioner is not pursuing this petition diligently, which is accordingly dismissed in non-prosecution along-with listed application. JUDGE JUDGE Muhammad Danish Steno*
